title: Rhythm: prose paragraph at speed
description: Rhythm exercise — full narrative paragraph, find sustained tempo
text: She had been writing for almost an hour when the door opened. Her brother walked in with two cups of tea and a wide smile. "How is the chapter coming along?" he asked, sitting down beside her. "Almost done," she said, and they both laughed.

tips.text: Dialogue is great rhythm practice — short bursts with structure
Quotes break flow — practice their entry/exit smoothly

tips.target: She had been writing for almost an hour when the door opened. Her brother walked in with two cups of tea and

tips.text: Enable metronome at 62 BPM — match your finger tempo

tips.target: a wide smile. "How is the chapter coming along?" he asked, sitting down beside her. "Almost done," she said, and they both laughed.

character_tips.anna: Dialogue + narration is real writing. Master both transitions.
character_tips.maxim: Quotes test your Shift timing under prose flow. Stay smooth.
character_tips.klavochka: Two voices in one paragraph, my sunshine 🌷
